definition:
σχολή, -ῆς, ἡ 
 [in LXX: Gen.33:14 (κατὰ σ., אַט), Pro.28:19, Sir.38:24 * ;] 
  1. leisure. 
   2. Later (from Plato on), 
   (a) that for which leisure is employed, a disputation, lecture; 
   (b) the place where lectures are delivered, a school: Act.19:9 (for the later sense of employment, see MM, xxiv).†
 (AS)
